channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Intense Northeast blizzard had a ‘Goldilocks’ situation to roll up monster snow totals
item.description: Meteorologists say the powerful nor’easter smacking the Northeast is a classic, record-setting blizzard.

item.title: Blizzard live updates: Snow totals top 2 feet as wind gusts reach 80 mph
item.description: A massive winter storm is barreling through the Northeast, dumping more than 2 feet of snow.

item.title: Some U.S. Embassy staff in Beirut ordered to leave amid escalating tensions
item.description: The State Department has ordered some staff in the U.S. Embassy in Beirut to begin to leave Lebanon, multiple sources familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Dow slides nearly 800 points as AI and tariff risks rattle investors
item.description: The Dow Jones slid nearly 800 points as investors fret over AI disruption and react to President Trump's new tariff agenda.

item.title: Snow still falling across Northeast U.S. as massive blizzard continues track
item.description: More than half a million power outages have been reported across the East Coast as a historic blizzard continues to impact states from Maryland to Mai...

item.title: What to know about Mexico violence as president offers reassurances
item.description: Widespread cartel-organized violence erupted following his death, with vehicles set on fire and hundreds of road blockages, Mexican officials said.

item.title: EU fails to pass new sanctions targeting Russia after Hungary objects
LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Latest on Trump's plan to raise global tariffs to 15% after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: President Trump said Saturday that he will raise global tariffs to 15% after the Supreme Court struck down a set of sweeping global tariffs in a decis...

item.title: WATCH: Smoke blankets Mexico's Puerto Vallarta after death of cartel leader
item.description: Widespread violence erupted after a cartel boss was killed in a military raid.

item.title: Trump continues to lash out at Supreme Court after tariff ruling
item.description: President Trump continues to lash out at the Supreme Court days after a majority of justices struck down most of his global tariffs as illegal.

item.title: Tariffs pose "huge uncertainty" after Supreme Court ruling, experts say
item.description: The Trump administration is unlikely to back down from pursuing additional tariffs following the Supreme Court decision, according to trade experts.

item.title: Prosecutors stand by former militant’s conviction but blast judge’s prior conduct as prosecutor
